</ul>

## My open source contributions

<!-- CONTRIBUTIONS-START -->
| Repository | Description | PRs |
|---|---|---|
| [openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-explorer](https://github.com/openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-explorer) | An alternative frontend for OpenFoodFacts, made with SvelteKit | [6](https://github.com/openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-explorer/pulls?q=is%3Apr%20is%3Amerged%20author%3Abobcorn) |
| [openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-server](https://github.com/openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-server) | Open Food Facts database, API server and web interface - 🐪🦋 Perl, CSS and JS coders welcome 😊 For helping in Python, see Robotoff or taxonomy-editor | [2](https://github.com/openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-server/pulls?q=is%3Apr%20is%3Amerged%20author%3Abobcorn) |
| [openfoodfacts/documentation](https://github.com/openfoodfacts/documentation) | OpenFoodFacts Documentation provides up-to-date API docs, generated from the spec file, for easy developer integration. | [1](https://github.com/openfoodfacts/documentation/pulls?q=is%3Apr%20is%3Amerged%20author%3Abobcorn) |
<!-- CONTRIBUTIONS-END -->
